translations.en: I see Leo near the entrance.
translations.es: Veo a Leo cerca de la entrada.
translations.de: Ich sehe Leo in der Nähe des Eingangs.
translations.he: אני רואה את ליאו ליד הכניסה.
translations.vi: Tôi thấy Leo gần lối vào.
translations.nl: Ik zie Leo bij de ingang.
translations.hi: मैं प्रवेश द्वार के पास लियो को देखता हूँ.
translations.el: Βλέπω τον Λέο κοντά στην είσοδο.
translations.id: Saya melihat Leo di dekat pintu masuk.
translations.ro: Îl văd pe Leo lângă intrare.
translations.ja: 入口の近くでレオが見えます。

tokens.explanation: Present indicative 1st person singular of 'apercevoir'; elided subject pronoun 'je' (J') attached; transitive verb taking 'Léo' as direct object.
Proper noun; direct object of the verb ('person perceived').
Adverb forming the fixed locution 'près de' meaning 'near'; expresses proximity when followed by 'de' + noun phrase.
Preposition required after 'près' to link to the complement NP.
Common noun with elided definite article 'l'' (from 'la' here) before a vowel; object of the preposition 'de' in the locative phrase.

sentences.target: Tu aperçois la voiture rouge, là-bas.

translations.fr: Tu aperçois la voiture rouge, là-bas.
translations.en: Do you see the red car over there?
translations.de: Du siehst das rote Auto da drüben.
translations.yue: 你見到嗰邊嗰架紅色車。
translations.ru: Ты видишь вон ту красную машину.
translations.pt: Você vê o carro vermelho lá.
translations.he: אתה רואה את המכונית האדומה שם.
translations.vi: Bạn thấy chiếc xe màu đỏ ở đằng kia.
translations.nl: Je ziet die rode auto daar.
translations.uk: Ти бачиш ту червону машину там.
translations.hi: तुम वहाँ लाल कार देखते हो.
translations.nb: Du ser den røde bilen der borte.
translations.id: Kamu melihat mobil merah di sana.
translations.sv: Du ser den röda bilen där borta.
translations.da: Du ser den røde bil derovre.
translations.ja: あそこに赤い車が見える。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Present indicative 2nd person singular of 'apercevoir'; takes a direct object ('la voiture').
Definite article, feminine singular, marking the noun 'voiture'.
Common noun; direct object of 'aperçois'.
Adjective; post-nominal modifier of 'voiture'; agrees in gender/number (form identical in masc/fem singular).
Deictic adverb of place; locative adjunct indicating distance.

sentences.target: Nous apercevons la montagne derrière les arbres.
sentences.reading: /nu a.pɛʁ.sə.vɔ̃ la mɔ̃.taɲ dɛ.ʁjɛʁ le zaʁbʁ/

translations.fr: Nous apercevons la montagne derrière les arbres.
translations.ipa: /nu a.pɛʁ.sə.vɔ̃ la mɔ̃.taɲ dɛ.ʁjɛʁ le zaʁbʁ/
translations.en: We see the mountain behind the trees.
translations.es: Vemos la montaña detrás de los árboles.
translations.de: Wir sehen den Berg hinter den Bäumen.
translations.it: Vediamo la montagna dietro gli alberi.
translations.pt: Vemos a montanha atrás das árvores.
translations.he: אנחנו רואים את ההר מאחורי העצים.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi thấy ngọn núi đằng sau những cây.
translations.nl: We zien de berg achter de bomen.
translations.hu: Látjuk a hegyet a fák mögött.
translations.hi: हम पेड़ों के पीछे पहाड़ को देखते हैं.
translations.el: Βλέπουμε το βουνό πίσω από τα δέντρα.
translations.id: Kami melihat gunung di belakang pepohonan.
translations.ja: 木々の向こうに山が見える。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person plural.
Present indicative 1st person plural of 'apercevoir'; takes 'la montagne' as direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular, marking 'montagne'.
Common noun; direct object of 'apercevons'.
Preposition introducing the complement 'les arbres'; forms a locative PP.
Definite article, plural, marking 'arbres'.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition 'derrière'.

sentences.target: Je veux apercevoir le bus avant huit heures.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vø a.pɛʁ.sə.vwaʁ lə bys a.vɑ̃ ɥit œʁ/

translations.fr: Je veux apercevoir le bus avant huit heures.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vø a.pɛʁ.sə.vwaʁ lə bys a.vɑ̃ ɥit œʁ/
translations.en: I want to see the bus before eight.
translations.es: Quiero ver el autobús antes de las ocho.
translations.de: Ich will den Bus vor acht Uhr sehen.
translations.it: Voglio vedere l'autobus prima delle otto.
translations.ko: 여덟 시 전에 버스를 보고 싶어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想在八点之前看到公交车。
translations.yue: 我想喺八點前見到巴士。
translations.ru: Я хочу увидеть автобус до восьми.
translations.pt: Quero ver o ônibus antes das oito.
translations.he: אני רוצה לראות את האוטובוס לפני שמונה.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn thấy xe buýt trước tám giờ.
translations.ar: أريد أن أرى الحافلة قبل الساعة الثامنة.
translations.nl: Ik wil de bus voor acht uur zien.
translations.uk: Я хочу побачити автобус до восьмої.
translations.hu: Nyolc előtt látni akarom a buszt.
translations.hi: मैं आठ बजे से पहले बस को देखना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Θέλω να δω το λεωφορείο πριν από τις οκτώ.
translations.nb: Jeg vil se bussen før klokka åtte.
translations.id: Saya ingin melihat bus sebelum jam delapan.
translations.sv: Jag vill se bussen före klockan åtta.
translations.ro: Vreau să văd autobuzul înainte de ora opt.
translations.da: Jeg vil se bussen før klokken otte.
translations.ja: 八時前にバスを見たい。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Present indicative 1st person singular of 'vouloir'; semi-auxiliary governing the infinitive 'apercevoir'.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'veux', expressing intended action.
Definite article, masculine singular, marking 'bus'.
Common noun; direct object of the infinitive 'apercevoir'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Cardinal numeral modifying 'heures' in a time expression; invariable.
Common noun, plural; time unit serving as the complement of 'avant' ('huit heures' = time expression).
